flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of the South rose 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.9k → $22.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The University of the South rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.4k → $56.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The University of the South rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.4k → $56.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The University of the South fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
